assertions.title: Assertion show/update persists results and evidence

steps.action: Create mission with plan containing features with fulfills assertions
steps.expected: Mission created with assertions in assertions.json
Returns assertions list with JSON format
steps.observed: Returned 2 assertions with correct structure including id, status, description, evidence fields

steps.action: Run maestro validate update f1-assertion-1 --status passed --evidence "Test passed"
steps.expected: Assertion updated to passed with evidence stored
steps.observed: Assertion f1-assertion-1 updated to passed with evidence "Test passed successfully"

steps.expected: Evidence and status persisted to filesystem
steps.observed: assertions.json contains updated status "passed" and evidence field

assertions.title: Waive and retry paths enforce guardrails

steps.action: Test waive without reason - maestro validate update f1-assertion-2 --status waived
steps.expected: Fails with validation error requiring waivedReason
steps.observed: Command failed with error: waivedReason is required when status is 'waived'

steps.action: Test waive with reason - maestro validate update f1-assertion-2 --status waived --reason "Known issue"
steps.observed: Assertion updated to waived with waivedReason "Known issue"

steps.action: Test illegal transition passed -> pending on f1-assertion-1
steps.expected: Fails with helpful hints about valid transitions
steps.observed: Error: Invalid assertion transition: passed -> pending. Hint: passed is a terminal state

steps.action: Test illegal transition waived -> pending on f1-assertion-2
steps.observed: Error: Invalid assertion transition: waived -> pending. Hint: waived is a terminal state
assertions.json shows waivedReason field for waived assertion

evidence.cliOutput: Error messages include helpful hints for invalid transitions

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-VALIDATION-001 confirmed validate show/update correctly persists results and evidence. VAL-VALIDATION-002 confirmed waive requires reason, retry transitions work for non-terminal states, and illegal transitions fail with helpful hints naming valid next states.
